name: Combobox
goal: Provide a filterable text input bound to a popup listbox for single-value selection with keyboard navigation.
description: Form-associated combobox combining a text input with a filterable popup listbox. Accepts options via a JSON data attribute or slotted ce-option children (CDR-005). Supports keyboard navigation, allow-custom mode for free-text entry, loading state, and full ARIA combobox pattern. Emits ce-change on selection.
limitations: Groups are visual only — no nested ARIA grouprole. allow-custom mode commits the raw typed string as both value and label. Listbox is positioned with fixed JS math; CSS anchor-positioning deferred to v2.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name submitted with the form.

props.name: value
props.description: Currently selected option value; synced to ElementInternals for form submission.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown in the input when nothing is selected.

props.name: data
props.description: JSON array of options ({value, label?, disabled?, group?}). When empty, slotted ce-option children are used instead (CDR-005 dual mode).

props.name: allowCustom
props.description: When true, pressing Enter with text that does not match any option commits the typed string as the new value.

props.name: loading
props.description: Replaces the toggle chevron with a spinner and prevents interaction.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls the listbox visibility; reflected for CSS host selectors.

events.name: ce-change
events.description: Fired when the user selects an option (click or Enter) or commits a custom value. detail.value is the option value; detail.label is the human-readable label.

slots.description: ce-option children for the slot-mode authoring path (CDR-005). The combobox reads value/label/disabled/group attributes from each child.

cssVariables.name: --ce-radius-sm
cssVariables.description: Corner radius for field shell and listbox.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: Focus border and selected check mark color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Placeholder, toggle chevron, spinner, and group header color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Option vertical padding and check mark margin.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Option horizontal padding and toggle chevron padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-focus-ring
cssVariables.description: Focus ring applied to the field shell when the input is focused.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Border, background, and listbox entrance animation transition.

cssVariables.name: --ce-popover-z
cssVariables.description: z-index for the listbox panel. Override to stack above modals.

cssVariables.name: --ce-combobox-listbox-max-height
cssVariables.description: Maximum height of the listbox panel before it scrolls.

globalDependencies.purpose: Renders the listbox in the top layer so it escapes overflow:hidden containers.
Form-association: propagates the selected value to the surrounding form without a hidden input.

sideEffects.description: Adds a 'click' listener on document to implement click-outside close.
sideEffects.reason: The listbox renders in the top layer (fixed position); the host element's own events don't capture outside clicks.

sideEffects.description: Adds resize and scroll listeners on window and scroll ancestors while the listbox is open.
sideEffects.reason: Keeps listbox position aligned with the field when the page scrolls or the viewport resizes.

a11y.notes: Follows the ARIA combobox pattern: input has role=combobox, aria-expanded, aria-controls (listbox id), aria-autocomplete=list, and aria-activedescendant pointing at the highlighted option. The listbox div has role=listbox. Each option div has role=option, aria-selected, and aria-disabled. Keyboard: ArrowDown/Up navigate options; Enter selects; Escape closes. Tab closes without selecting. The toggle chevron and spinner are aria-hidden because the input provides the accessible name.

siblings.description: Lightweight option child element for the slot-mode authoring path. Attributes: value (string), label (string), disabled (boolean), group (string). The combobox reads these at slot-change time and builds its internal option model.

cdrCompliance.CDR-001: No vocabulary enum on combobox itself. group is a free-text string on ce-option.
cdrCompliance.CDR-002: value is a string scalar. Options carry value+label scalars. Compliant.
cdrCompliance.CDR-005: Dual-form: data JSON attribute OR ce-option slot children. Both modes tested.
cdrCompliance.CDR-006: Composes: consumer wraps in ce-field for label/help/error.
cdrCompliance.CDR-007: Works zero-config with just name + slot children.
